positive: Highly detailed illustration of cosmic botanical elements. Center composition featuring stylized glowing nebulas interweaving with exotic, bioluminescent flowers and delicate space vines. Use a strong silhouette style with clean edges. The color palette should be deep midnight blues, vibrant purples, electric teal, and pops of golden gold light. Excellent contrast and negative space suitable for apparel printing. Minimalist yet complex, vector art aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, ugly, noisy, jpeg artifacts, messy, dirty, grainy
